# Now I See Web3
> Free, open-source on-chain data analyzer for Ethereum and EVM developers. Decode calldata, inspect transactions, debug Solidity errors, and look up function selectors.

## Tools
- Transaction Analyzer: https://nowiseeweb3.xyz/tx-analyzer
- Calldata Decoder: https://nowiseeweb3.xyz/calldata-decoder
- Error Decoder: https://nowiseeweb3.xyz/error-decoder
- Function Selector Generator: https://nowiseeweb3.xyz/function-selector
- Event Topic Hash Generator: https://nowiseeweb3.xyz/event-topic
- Search Function Selector: https://nowiseeweb3.xyz/search-function-selector

## Docs
- Calldata Decoder Guide: https://nowiseeweb3.xyz/docs/calldata-decoder
- Error Decoder Guide: https://nowiseeweb3.xyz/docs/error-decoder
- Transaction Analyzer Guide: https://nowiseeweb3.xyz/docs/tx-analyzer
- Special Format Decoder Guide: https://nowiseeweb3.xyz/docs/special-format-decoder

## About
- About: https://nowiseeweb3.xyz/about
- Contact: https://nowiseeweb3.xyz/contact
- Privacy Policy: https://nowiseeweb3.xyz/privacy
- Terms of Use: https://nowiseeweb3.xyz/terms
- Source Code: https://github.com/imelon2/now-i-see-web3
